title: Time to Kill
writer: Clarence Upson Young, Raymond Chandler, Brett Halliday
actors: Lloyd Nolan, Heather Angel, Doris Merrick
plot: A private detective is hired to retrieve a valuable antique coin that was stolen from an old dowager to pay off a blackmailer. The private eye soon finds himself up to his ears in cover-ups, a timid secretary, fights, more blackma...
